lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a funny name you've got.

lines.speaker: Narf
lines.text: 'Narf'? You think that's funny? At least I don't call myself [player name]! Where did you get a name like that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seemed like a good idea at the time!

lines.speaker: Narf
lines.text: Nice one! I have new information to share with you.
